title: Xeniatrum umbellatum
taxonomy: Xeniatrum umbellatum is classified under the plant family Menispermaceae. This plant family consists of approximately 140-150 species, commonly known as moonseed. Menispermaceae is a family of flowering plants native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the world. The family includes a diverse range of species, many of which are used in traditional medicine. The classification of Xeniatrum umbellatum under the family Menispermaceae reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in this group.
